metadata.name: Evolution Worker Service
metadata.description: Test background evolution worker - pain signal detection, queueing, and dispatch
metadata.author: Claude Code

steps.name: Check Evolution Worker Status
steps.description: Verify that EvolutionWorker service is running
steps.task: Check if the EvolutionWorker service is running by looking for processes containing 'evolution-worker' or checking plugin services. Report the status.

steps.name: Create Test Pain Signal
steps.description: Create a test pain signal to trigger evolution worker
steps.task: Create a test pain signal by writing to the .pain_flag file in workspace. Use this format: 'TEST_PAIN|$(date +%s)|Test pain signal for evolution worker|5'.

steps.name: Wait for Evolution Worker Processing
steps.description: Allow time for evolution worker to scan and process pain signal

steps.name: Check Evolution Queue
steps.description: Verify pain signal was queued in evolution_queue.json

steps.name: Verify Pain Signal Format
steps.description: Check that queued pain signal has correct structure

steps.name: Check Event Log for Evolution Events

notes: Evolution worker successfully detects pain signals
Cleanup required to remove test signals
